sentences.arabic: أَقَامَ نَادِي الشَّطْرَنْجِ مُسَابَقَةً لِلأَطْفَالِ وَالشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Šahovski klub je organizovao takmičenje za djecu i mlade.
sentences.translationEn: The chess club held a competition for children and youth.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ خَمْسَةٌ وَعِشْرُونَ لَاعِبًا مِنْ أَعْمَارٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dvadeset i pet igrača različite dobi je učestvovalo.
sentences.translationEn: Twenty-five players of different ages participated.

sentences.arabic: فَازَ وَلَدٌ صَغِيرٌ عُمْرُهُ عَشْرُ سَنَوَاتٍ بِالْجَائِزَةِ الأُولَى.
sentences.translation: Dječak od deset godina je osvojio prvu nagradu.
sentences.translationEn: A ten-year-old boy won the first prize.

sentences.translation: Svi su bili oduševljeni ovim talentovanim djetetom.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone was impressed by this talented child.
